query:
SELECT 
  h1.ticker,
  h1.date as split_date,
  h1.close as price_before,
  h2.close as price_after,
  ROUND((h2.close / h1.close - 1) * 100, 2) as price_change_pct
FROM historicalPrices h1
JOIN historicalPrices h2 ON h1.ticker = h2.ticker 
  AND h2.date = (
    SELECT MIN(date) 
    FROM historicalPrices 
    WHERE ticker = h1.ticker 
    AND date > h1.date
  )
WHERE h1.ticker IN (SELECT ticker FROM stocks)
  AND h1.date >= '2022-11-01'
  AND (h2.close / h1.close) < 0.6
ORDER BY h1.date DESC, price_change_pct ASC
LIMIT 50;
